text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since Manhattan Cafe and I had an honest
exchange about our hopes at the airport, our
bond is stronger than ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Slowly but surely, she's bouncing back from
despair and seems to be smiling more than she
used to as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a little past dawn, and we're at Hanshin
Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen... The stage for our new
beginning...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Manhattan Cafe back on a domestic track,
we set our sights firmly on reaching the top of the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today's rival is...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The view from the lead is mine. And mine alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka. A racer known for her
otherworldly speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's broken away and left the competition in the
dust countless times, seizing victory after victory.
A powerful opponent who races not to conquer
her rivals but to surpass all limits.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
This view... is going to stay mine. There's no one
in front of me...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes, there is!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, it's my friend... She's in front of Silence
Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What? But she isn't. There's nobody.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, so she doesn't disappear... just because
you're apart. She's almost like a searchlight, or a
fishing line...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh. This is truly fascinating, and yet, more
importantly...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Take a look, Trainer. Feast your eyes on Cafe's
condition!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Her cardiovascular and pulmonary health are in
good shape! Even the air around her seems to
simmer with energy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a good look at Manhattan Cafe. The results
of canceling her international trip are crystal
clear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We shifted gears and put ourselves on track for
success here. Now I can support her free of
concern.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, today's the day. Your new frontier's
waiting for you. Our Plan B...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Realize that potential! Show me what's beyond
the limits! Leave everything and everyone in the
dust!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: In the dust? That's no place for me...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Where I belong... is in the lead.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
(Silence Suzuka... She's a little different from
what I've heard...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
(I heard she was reserved, but there's a
earth-shattering intensity lurking there...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
(My friend's saying the same thing. "Go beyond
her, and come to me...")

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though no words are exchanged, sparks are
flying.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka has taken the lead... Will
Manhattan Cafe get a glimpse at what lies
beyond her limits?
